SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2007 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CADIZ, IRENE DELPIT,  ALLISON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEDESCHI, VERONICA $2,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,325.00, $50.00 OF THE JUDGMENT IS PAYABLE TO PLAINTIFF ALLISON DELPIT INDIVIDUALLY. THE BALANCE IS PAYABLE JOINTLY TO ALL PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
